_comment: Connectors hub — the single registry of every data source feeding the cockpit, per tenant. Each generator/puller reads this instead of hardcoding sources. Adding a source = an entry here (+ an adapter if a new type). Types: drive (xlsx/sheet via service account), gmail (threads via connector/build-threads), viber (computer-use bridge, planned), galaxy (iStock SQL/export, planned).

connectors.note: in personal Drive, not the shared folder — 404s for the service account; cached copy used

connectors.pull: Gmail connector search_threads -> data/raw/page*.json -> build-threads.mjs -> threads.live.json

connectors.access: all roles, scoped by group (PANEL_USERS groups); NOT CEO-only like email
connectors.pull: viber-pull.mjs — Viber Desktop DB found but SQLCipher-ENCRYPTED; practical path = computer-use bridge -> OCR/LLM extractor -> data/manual-entries/viber-<group>.json
connectors.consumed_by: manual-entries.mjs -> feed.captures (group-tagged); redactForRole scopes by group
connectors.note: see VIBER-INTEGRATION.md §DECISION; needs a computer-use grant for Viber Desktop

connectors.pull: Galaxy iStock SQL export / xlsx -> galaxy-istock.mjs adapter
connectors.note: showroom sales orders + dealer credit; per-site
